title: Note editor improvements
notes: Enhanced note editor with improved indentation and scrolling
Refined reading mode UI and editing flow

title: In-app updates
notes: New update indicator in the sidebar footer — shows a spinner while checking, an arrow when a new version is ready to install
One-click restart to apply updates without leaving the app
Manual check button always available next to the version number
Update status persists if you dismiss the prompt — the indicator stays until you restart

title: Bible translations & data protection
notes: Multiple Bible translation support — switch between WEB, ESV, KJV, and more in Settings
Vault system for data portability — your notes live in ~/Documents/Berean and can be moved
Welcome screen on first launch to guide vault setup
Bible versioning and chapter navigation improvements

title: Welcome to Berean
notes: Bible study notes that stay with you — capture, read, and reflect
Passage capture with verse anchors, categories, and cross-references
Reading mode with inline verse text from the World English Bible
Thematic entries for freeform study notes
